Variable.Name: b_enableGroupContractMode
Variable.Description: (Temporary) boolean used to turn on the checkbox that can show the groupcontract calculation charts

DefaultValue.Code: Map.of( OL_ResultsUIMode.ENERGY, List.of( OL_ChartTypes.PROFILES, OL_ChartTypes.BAR_TOTALS, OL_ChartTypes.LOAD_DURATION_CURVES, OL_ChartTypes.SANKEY, OL_ChartTypes.GESPREKSLEIDRAAD_BEDRIJVEN, OL_ChartTypes.GESPREKSLEIDRAAD, OL_ChartTypes.BATTERY, OL_ChartTypes.GTO ), OL_ResultsUIMode.ECONOMIC, List.of( OL_ChartTypes.ENERGY_COSTS, OL_ChartTypes.CONNECTION_COSTS, OL_ChartTypes.CAPEX_AND_OPEX, OL_ChartTypes.TOTAL_COSTS ), OL_ResultsUIMode.SUSTAINABILITY, List.of( OL_ChartTypes.CO2 ) )

CollectionInitializer.Code: { OL_EnergyCarriers.ELECTRICITY, OL_EnergyCarriers.METHANE, OL_EnergyCarriers.PETROLEUM_FUEL, OL_EnergyCarriers.HEAT, OL_EnergyCarriers.HYDROGEN, OL_EnergyCarriers.IRON_POWDER }

{ new CustomButton(button_chart1, txt_header_chartbutton1, null), new CustomButton(button_chart2, txt_header_chartbutton2, null), new CustomButton(button_chart3, txt_header_chartbutton3, null), new CustomButton(button_chart4, txt_header_chartbutton4, null), new CustomButton(button_chart5, txt_header_chartbutton5, null), new CustomButton(button_chart6, txt_header_chartbutton6, null) }
